name: ES Application & Feature Tracking
description: Self-aware registry of applications that use elementStore, canonical ES features, and per-app feature implementation progress

classes.name: ES Application
classes.description: An application that uses elementStore — as server, client, or declaration provider

props.label: Name
props.description: Application name

props.label: Description
props.description: What this app does

props.label: Application
props.description: Links to @application in platform_root registry

props.label: Role
props.description: How this app relates to elementStore

props.label: Server URL
props.description: ES API URL (serves or connects to)

props.label: Repositories
props.description: Repository IDs that interact with ES

props.label: Genesis Files
props.description: Genesis/seed file paths

props.label: Class Count
props.description: Total ES classes this app defines

props.label: CRUD Providers
props.description: CRUD provider IDs for API mapping

props.label: Client Language
props.description: Primary language of ES client code

props.label: Status
props.description: Current status of this app's ES integration

classes.name: ES Feature
classes.description: A canonical elementStore capability that can be implemented by clients and servers

props.label: Name
props.description: Feature name

props.label: Description
props.description: What this feature does

props.label: Category
props.description: Broad classification of the feature area

props.label: Group
props.description: Feature sub-group for display organization within a category

props.label: Scope
props.description: Whether this feature applies to server, client, or both

props.label: API Endpoints
props.description: Related API routes

props.label: Depends On
props.description: Other features this depends on

classes.name: App Feature Progress
classes.description: Tracks which ES features each application implements and their implementation progress

props.label: Application
props.description: The es:app this feature record belongs to

props.label: Feature
props.description: The feature

props.label: Progress
props.description: Implementation progress

props.label: Server Endpoints
props.description: HTTP endpoints this app exposes as a server for this feature (empty if client-only)

props.label: Notes
props.description: Implementation notes, limitations, known gaps

props.label: Implemented In
props.description: File paths (file:line) where this feature is implemented
